species.notes: Comparator support only. Reindeer remains visible for ancient cervid context, not for domesticated-core inference.

species_manifest.scientific_scope: Reindeer is comparator support only and must not be used as domesticated-core evidence.
species_manifest.runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.

analysis_boundary: Ancient material is curated only as comparator support and must not be flattened into domesticated-core inference. Normalized runtime ingestion is not yet implemented for this species.
